'''Emd Grahvess''' was considered one of the best architects in the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] who did not work for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] or [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]]. He was once contracted by [[Gheeta]] to design the terminal and diplomatic reception site on the [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoid]] [[Circumtore/Legends|Circumtore]]. After its construction, Gheeta planned to have Emd [[Death/Legends|killed]] so he could never design anything else.

Emd was no fool and planned his escape. He placed a large [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on himself before Gheeta could have him killed. [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] accepted the job and rescued Emd from Circumtore. In return, Emd placed a secret [[Reactor/Legends|reactor core]] in his designs.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Mandalorian Armor]]'' {{1stm}}
